history.subject: Serre finiteness: descend projectivity and finite presentation to scheme-theoretic fibres
Serre finiteness → Hilbert polynomial: the graded Hilbert–Serre engine bridge (I-0109)
Projective morphism stability API + O(m) sign validated

Restate Quot-scheme representability faithfully to Nitsure §5 (I-0118): hypotheses are now π projective carrying a relatively very ample L (IsProjectiveWith: closed immersion into ℙ(Fin(d+1);S) over S with L ≅ i*O(1)) and E coherent, at Scheme.{0} — replacing the false-or-open proper-only pin (for merely proper π the Quot functor is in general only an algebraic space, Hironaka counterexample family). Finite type is derived via IsProjectiveWith.locallyOfFiniteType, clearing the overlappingInstances lint. Statement lives in the new leaf Picard/QuotRepresentability.lean (ProjectiveMorphism imports QuotFunctorDef, same split as Grassmannian.representable); the proof stays the single tracked sorry of the Quot endgame.

Glued-sheaf global sections API (Option-B Phase 0, P0.1): Γ(glue D M g, ⊤) ≅ compatible families. Evaluation at ⊤ preserves the descent equalizer of pushforward products, so global sections of the glued sheaf are the Γ(𝒪)-submodule of chart-section families agreeing on overlaps through the transition isos: glueSectionsEquiv, forward map = chart projections (glueProj i).app ⊤, joint detection glue_sections_ext, plus the section-level product API gammaPiHom/gamma_pi_ext/gamma_pi_surjective. Fully proved, no sorries.

Div base change: signed-off statement repair (qcoh hypothesis on E, Stacks 01LA remark) + the 00HL brick. New leaf FlatKernelBase.lean: Tor-free 3x3-chase proof that a flat cokernel keeps A⊗N → B⊗N injective (free presentation of N, elementwise chase); unit module is quasi-coherent (via unitPresentation); kernel-pullback comparison map g'^*(ker q) ⟶ ker(g'^*q) (kernelComparison at the left-adjoint module pullback); trivialising chart shrinks along any smaller open (01HH chain along homOfLE) + affine shrink corollary. DivFunctorDef: pullback_kernel_isLocallyTrivial gains (hE : E.IsQuasicoherent); sole consumer DivFamily.pullbackAlong discharges it by pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom + the unit instance.

Div base change read-off: pinned statement follows from the iso form of the kernel-pullback comparison. New lemma pullback_kernel_isLocallyTrivial_of_isIso_kernelComparison: if pullbackKernelComparison g' q is an iso, local triviality of ker q transports to ker(g'^*q) (01HH pullback + iso-invariance); module docstring records the qcoh-hypothesis repair (01LA removability) and the FlatKernelBase brick inventory.

A.3: close IdentityComponent.isFiniteTypeGeometricallyIrreducible (Kleiman 5.1(3)(c)). Over the algebraic closure, right-translate a nonempty irreducible open chart (carved from a Noetherian affine open) through every closed point via mulRight (g'^-1 * z') with closed points = rational points, sweep non-closed points by Jacobson density, and conclude irreducibility from connectedness + EGA I 6.1.10; quasi-compactness by the W*W multiplication-image trick at rational points, a finite affine subcover, and Jacobson density. Both conjuncts descend to an arbitrary base field along the surjective projection from the base change to the algebraic closure via baseChangeIso and pullback pasting. Axiom-clean: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound].

Serre-twist Γ-section transport (P0.2 scaffold): Γ(serreTwist n m, ⊤) ≃ compatible families over the basic-open cover. New generic atoms: pushforwardEquivalenceOfIso + pullbackIsoPushforwardInv (pullback along a scheme iso IS pushforward of the inverse, by uniqueness of left adjoints to pushforward), gammaAddEquivOfIso, gamma_unit_top. Instantiations: serreTwistGluedSectionsEquiv (glueSectionsEquiv at the O(m) descent datum), serreTwistIsoPushforwardGlued (serreTwist = fromGlued-pushforward of the glued twist), serreTwistSectionsCompatible (headline: Γ(O(m)) = (Xi/Xj)^m-compatible chart families). All axiom-clean, no sorries. Registered module in AlgebraicJacobian.lean.

First descent leg on unit modules = ring restriction along the overlap immersion (P0.2/P0.3 a-side atom). glueLegAComponent_unit: for any rank-one (unit) descent datum, composing the a-leg with the pushforward of the pullbackUnitIso trivialization is the pushforward of unitToPushforwardObjUnit of f_ij — via the homEquiv identity pullbackObjUnitToUnit = homEquiv.symm(unitToPushforwardObjUnit) and naturality of pushforwardComp. Section level (glueLegAComponent_unit_app): the a-side of the Serre-twist compatible-family condition is literally (f_ij).appTop. Axiom-clean.
